arabic: بَعْدَ رِحْلَةٍ طَوِيلَةٍ بِالطَّائِرَةِ شَعَرْتُ بِالتَّعَبِ وَاضْطِرَابِ النَّوْمِ. كَانَ فَرْقُ التَّوْقِيتِ بَيْنَ بَلَدَيِ خَمْسَ سَاعَاتٍ. فِي الْيَوْمِ الأَوَّلِ نِمْتُ مُبَكِّرًا جِدًّا وَاسْتَيْقَظْتُ فِي مُنْتَصَفِ اللَّيْلِ. نَصَحَنِي الطَّبِيبُ بِالْبَقَاءِ مُسْتَيْقِظًا حَتَّى الْمَسَاءِ. بَعْدَ يَوْمَيْنِ عَادَ نَوْمِي إِلَى طَبِيعَتِهِ.
translation: Nakon dugog leta osjećao sam umor i poremećaj sna. Razlika u vremenu između dvije zemlje bila je pet sati. Prvog dana sam zaspao vrlo rano i probudio se u ponoć. Doktor mi je savjetovao da ostanem budan do večeri. Nakon dva dana san mi se vratio u normalu.
translationEn: After a long flight I felt tired and my sleep was disrupted. The time difference between the two countries was five hours. On the first day I fell asleep very early and woke up at midnight. The doctor advised me to stay awake until evening. After two days my sleep returned to normal.
